features: Perfect Size: Measuring 30x25x13.5cm/11.8x9.84x5.3in, these 20 white gift bags offer ideal dimensions for jewellery, gifts, or retail items. Compact yet spacious enough for most presents

Reinforced for Durability: Featuring sturdy nylon twist handles and 250gsm thick card construction, these white gift bags can hold heavier items without tearing. The reinforced base ensures secure carrying of contents

Strong and Durable: The rope handle is made of thick and tight nylon braided design, which can be detachable and adjusted, and can be used continuously after the hole is stuck. The strap is soft and durable, comfortable to hold in the hand

Personalized DIY Paper Bags: Plain white surface of gift bag allows for personalisation - decorate with paints, stickers, or stamps. Ideal for branding with logos or creating unique party/event packaging

Multi-purpose Gift Bag: These medium gift bags are fantastic in size and sturdy. Great for shopping bags, gift bags, retail bags. Simple white paper bags are perfect for custom gift wrapping, wedding or party gift bags
